description: Monitors maritime operations, coordinates communications, tracks incidents, and supports operational decision-making in a command center environment.
Provides enterprise IT support, administers accounts and systems, troubleshoots outages, and maintains secure and reliable services for users.
Maintains and repairs propulsion and auxiliary machinery, executing preventive and corrective maintenance to maximize equipment availability and safety.
Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical systems; diagnoses faults and restores service to support safe and reliable operations.
Provides clinical support, patient care assistance, and medical administration to maintain health readiness and quality-of-care standards.
Manages procurement and inventory, processes requisitions, tracks assets, and ensures timely distribution of supplies to support operations.
Leads deck operations and maritime missions; supervises small teams, enforces safety standards, and supports mission execution on cutters and small boats.
Conducts maritime law enforcement and security operations, performs boardings/inspections, and supports incident response and risk mitigation.
Leads intelligence analysis and reporting; produces actionable assessments and briefings that inform operational and strategic decisions.
Integrates multi-source intelligence to produce assessments, briefings, and recommendations for senior decision-makers.
Manages counterintelligence programs and risk assessments to reduce organizational exposure and improve security posture.
Analyzes information from multiple sources to identify trends, risks, and actionable insights for leadership (legacy MOS code).
Interprets imagery and visual data to produce intelligence products that support planning and decision-making (legacy MOS code).
Analyzes communications-derived data to identify indicators and provide actionable intelligence to stakeholders (legacy MOS code).
Performs defensive cyber operations, monitoring security events and supporting remediation to reduce risk (legacy MOS code).
Supports electronic warfare and signals analysis operations to identify threats and inform operational decisions (legacy MOS code).
Supervises intelligence operations and analyst teams; enforces standards, develops personnel, and ensures timely, accurate reporting.
Performs voice interception and reporting functions to support intelligence analysis (legacy MOS code).
Provides language-enabled analysis and reporting to improve accuracy and usefulness of intelligence products (legacy MOS code).
Supports counterintelligence activities through information gathering, reporting, and risk reduction (legacy MOS code).
Performs defensive cyber operations including monitoring, detection, and incident response support to improve security posture.
